segments.text: sonar Cloud by sonar is a SAS tool that
helps developers and organizations
systematically deliver clean code
reintegrating into your Cloud devops
platform and extending the CI CD
workflow sonarcloud performs automated
code reviews to detect and fix issues
with speed and precision
sonarcloud provides continuous
inspection of projects and has
comprehensive coverage for the languages
and issue types that matter most
with our clean as you code methodology
and clear go no-go quality Gates only
code that meets the defined clean as you
code quality standard can be released to
production
when the code you deliver is always
clean you stay focused on Innovation
while progressively improving the
overall quality of your code base with
minimal cost and effort
trusted by millions of developers and
organizations globally to clean more
than half a trillion lines of code sonar
has become integral to delivering better
software

fullText: sonar Cloud by sonar is a SAS tool that helps developers and organizations systematically deliver clean code reintegrating into your Cloud devops platform and extending the CI CD workflow sonarcloud performs automated code reviews to detect and fix issues with speed and precision sonarcloud provides continuous inspection of projects and has comprehensive coverage for the languages and issue types that matter most with our clean as you code methodology and clear go no-go quality Gates only code that meets the defined clean as you code quality standard can be released to production when the code you deliver is always clean you stay focused on Innovation while progressively improving the overall quality of your code base with minimal cost and effort trusted by millions of developers and organizations globally to clean more than half a trillion lines of code sonar has become integral to delivering better software
